text: Were one to dissect the rhetoric of continuous delivery, one might conclude that velocity without verifiability is merely accelerated risk. I contend that mature teams treat observability budgets as constitutive of product quality—instrumentation, SLO review, and failure injection are not ornamental but epistemic. Consequently, prose that enumerates trade-offs with quantified confidence intervals does more for onboarding than aspirational slogans, provided reviewers insist on falsifiable claims rather than performative certainty.
